chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-2149 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders as to non prosecution. 04-10-2017. No one is present on behalf of petitioner neither any application nor any intimation is received. Similar situation was on last date. It appears that petitioner and her counsel have lost their interest. In such circumstances, this petition is dismissed in non prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Fahad Memon
